name: Justice D.Y. Chandrachud
bio: Justice Dhananjaya Yeshwant Chandrachud served as the 50th Chief Justice of India from November 2022 to November 2024. He is regarded as one of the most impactful Chief Justices in recent history, having authored landmark judgments on privacy, constitutional morality, and judicial process. Before becoming CJI, he authored the majority opinion in the Puttaswamy (Privacy) case. He is known for his progressive judicial philosophy and for championing technology in the justice system, including the e-courts initiative.
